daily.today_energy: Mercury's got you feeling sharp and intentional today. Channel that clarity into the things that actually matter—your energy is magnetic rn, so people are listening when you speak.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person notices you're glowing. Single? Someone's been lowkey watching. Either way, authenticity is your biggest flex today. Don't overthink the connection.
daily.career: This is your moment to speak up about something you've been sitting on. The vibe supports bold but thoughtful moves. Your attention to detail combined with confidence? That's literally unstoppable energy.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move intentionally—whether that's a walk, stretching, or dancing in your room. Mental clarity follows physical release. Listen to what feels good, not what feels obligatory.

weekly.overview: This week's energy invites you to soften your grip on perfection, Virgo. Mercury's dance suggests that messy progress beats polished stagnation. Trust the unfolding, even when it feels chaotic—your intuition knows what your overthinking doesn't.
weekly.love: Vulnerability looks good on you right now. If you've been holding back words, this is your sign to share them. Singles might vibe with someone who appreciates your authentic self, not your curated version. Let connection happen organically.
weekly.career: Your analytical skills are *chef's kiss* this week, but don't let perfectionism paralyze you. Take that risk on the project idea you've been workshopping. Your team needs your creative confidence, not your second-guessing.
weekly.health: Your nervous system could use some intentional slowness. Try grounding practices that feel real to you—whether that's walks, journaling, or just sitting without doom-scrolling. Small consistency beats intense effort.
